name: TONIX PHARMACEUTICALS HOLDIN
summary: TONIX PHARMACEUTICALS HOLDIN is a biopharmaceutical company developing therapeutics for central nervous system (CNS) disorders and immunological diseases. The company's pipeline includes product candidates for posttraumatic stress disorder (PTSD), fibromyalgia, and other conditions, with headquarters in Chatham, New Jersey. Tonix Pharmaceuticals aims to develop innovative therapies that address unmet medical needs in CNS and immunological disorders.
